    • Class com.saperion.rmi.SerializableStream

      class SerializableStream extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      -9028406544126952014L

      • Serialization Methods

        • readObject
          private void readObject(ObjectInputStream in) throws IOException
          Reads the input stream at RMI server side. De-serializes the stream and writes the document via the SaRMIServerCommand to the backend.
          Parameters:
          in - the in
          Throws:
          IOException - Signals that an I/O exception has occurred.
        • writeObject
          private void writeObject(ObjectOutputStream out) throws IOException
          Writes this stream to the given output stream (serializes this to the RMI Server) While writing the content, the stream validation is performed. In order to get the validation results, call method validate.

          Before writing the next buffer to server, this method checks if the current stream length exceeds the max allowed stream length. If so, a StreamVerificationException is thrown and stream writing is interrupted.

          Parameters:
          out - the out
          Throws:
          IOException - Signals that an I/O exception has occurred.

      • Serialized Fields

        • actualCount
          long actualCount
        • bufferSize
          int bufferSize
        • checkLength
          boolean checkLength
        • clearContent
          boolean clearContent
        • content
          ContentStream content
        • contentHandler
          SerializableStreamContentHandler.ContentHandlers contentHandler
        • doStreaming
          boolean doStreaming
        • element
          int element
        • filename
          String filename
        • input
          InputStream input
        • token
          int token
        • validationException
          StreamVerificationException validationException
        • variables
          Map<String,String> variables

      serialVersionUID:
      5810193954091736201L
